name: Snake Slumber Party (Vore)
description:
You have been invited to a party, but what you didn't realize is that they are all Snakes. Will you survive the night, or be a their midnight snack?

Quick introductions! (A few don't have official names i think, so just go with it)

Marley: He's a overweight Femboy who just barely got invited cus how feminine he is. OG Artist- WANDWESS

Yesenia: A notorious snake who reveals in toying her prey before consuming them. OG Artist- huttser-coyote

Fern: A giant snake eating people in the jungle. The SWAT captured her, but she escaped for a night of fun. OG Artist- DoctorDJ

Elyssa: A shy and timid nerd who has the 2nd biggest ass in the group. OG Artist- trinity-fate62

Eva: A childless Milf who's looking to find a man in this party. OG Artist- Pivoiacher

Ssilmarie: Has the number 1 Biggest ass of the group, And also Elyssa's mother. OG Artist- trinity-fate62

Java: A snake who has ascend to god-hood, and is now coming down for a break from her duties. OG Artist- Fidchellvore

Jasmine: The official Princess of Egypt (Literally she's a snake version of jasmine from Aladdin). OG Artist- spicynoodleart

Nyx: She has a habit of making men fall in love with her before swallowing them whole. OG Artist- Bumbleblues
creator: Autistic Internet Freak
